description: Auto-scale inference cluster based on certification exam traffic

input.input_text: GKE cluster serving certification exam platform. Traffic: 200 RPS baseline, 2000 RPS peak during promo events. Current: manual scaling with 30-min lag. Need auto-scaling within cost budget of $5K/month.

Current workflow to add a new skill: 1) Write skill.yaml manually (10 min), 2) Write prompt.md (20 min), 3) Write schema.json (10 min), 4) Write examples.json (15 min), 5) Run build.py (2 min), 6) Test each adapter manually (30 min). Total: ~90 min per skill, 51 skills = 76 hours.
